title: Chaos Breaks Out at Border Crossings With Iraq
summary_full: Videos verified by The New York Times show border crossings in southern Iraq becoming the latest target in the hostilities in the Middle East.
summary_public: Videos verified by The New York Times show border crossings in southern Iraq becoming the latest target in the hostilities in the Middle East.
